sections.paragraph:
- Original: θηλάζω

- Transliteration: thelazo

- Phonetic: thay-lad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to give the breast, give suck, to suckle

2. to suck

- Origin: from thele (the nipple)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From θηλή thē lē (the nipple); to suckle; by implication to suck: - (give) suck (-ling).
